pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler source and target properties from Java 8 to Java 21 to align with the target JDK version.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project compiles against Java 8 language features, preventing the use of Java 21 features and potentially causing compatibility issues with libraries requiring newer bytecode.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Guava dependency to a version compatible with Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older versions of Guava may contain bytecode or internal APIs incompatible with Java 21, leading to runtime errors or compilation failures.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Maven Compiler Plugin to a version that supports Java 21 compilation.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older versions of the Maven Compiler Plugin may not support generating Java 21 bytecode or may fail to compile Java 21 source code.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Maven Surefire Plugin to a version compatible with JUnit 5 and Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older versions of Surefire may not properly detect or run JUnit 5 tests, or may fail on Java 21 due to module system changes.

src/test/java/com/devskiller/friendly_id.general_idea: Migrate JUnit 4 test annotation to JUnit 5 to align with Spring Boot 3.x requirements.
src/test/java/com/devskiller/friendly_id.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x requires JUnit 5; JUnit 4 classes like org.junit.Test are no longer supported or detected by the default test runner, causing tests to be skipped or fail to compile if dependencies are removed.

src/test/java/com/devskiller/friendly_id.general_idea: Migrate JUnit 4 test annotation import to JUnit 5 to align with Spring Boot 3.x requirements.
src/test/java/com/devskiller/friendly_id.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x requires JUnit 5; JUnit 4 classes like org.junit.Test are no longer on the classpath by default, causing compilation errors or test discovery failures.

src/test/java/com/devskiller/friendly_id.general_idea: Migrate JUnit 4 test annotation to JUnit 5 to align with Spring Boot 3.x requirements.
src/test/java/com/devskiller/friendly_id.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x requires JUnit 5; JUnit 4 classes like org.junit.Test are no longer on the classpath by default, causing compilation errors or test discovery failures.
